message:
refactor(core): session DNA rework, HyperLogLog tuning, pool/sharding cleanup, and proptest expansion

A targeted refactor and test-hardening pass across frankenterm-core
(+183 lines, -134 lines) touching 23 files:

Session DNA (session_dna.rs, +39 lines net):
- Rework DNA fingerprint computation with improved field weighting
  and hash mixing — session topology changes now produce more
  distinct fingerprints, reducing false-similar classifications
- Add accessor methods for introspection

HyperLogLog (hyperloglog.rs):
- Tune register count and bias-correction constants for better
  accuracy at low cardinalities (the regime most relevant to
  per-session distinct-command counting)

Infrastructure modules (minor cleanups):
- pool.rs: simplify connection pool slot recycling and idle-timeout
  logic
- sharding.rs: align shard-key derivation with updated DNA hashing
- distributed.rs: adjust peer-announcement interval constants
- circuit_breaker.rs: tighten half-open probe window
- config.rs: update default timeout values
- error_codes.rs, events.rs: minor enum variant alignment
- ingest.rs, kalman_watchdog.rs, lib.rs: small import/signature
  fixes
- session_topology.rs: expand topology-change detection
- tantivy_query.rs: add bounds-check for term length
- user_preferences.rs: normalize preference serialization
- wezterm.rs: minor API alignment

Proptest suite expansion:
- proptest_workflows_expanded.rs: +73 lines, covering multi-step
  workflow state machines with richer shrinking strategies
- proptest_degradation_expanded.rs: improve degradation-ladder
  classifier coverage
- proptest_runtime_expanded.rs: add runtime-compat edge cases
- proptest_viewport_reflow.rs: tighten reflow invariants
- proptest_watchdog_expanded.rs: expand watchdog timeout scenarios
- proptest_storage_expanded.rs, proptest_runtime_compat.rs: minor
  assertion refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
